raw_consumer_statement:
I am an authorized user of my father 's Home Depot credit card. However, the card is used primarily by me to purchase building supplies for my business in XXXX Michigan. 
The card expired around the summer of XXXX  and new cards were requested. However, in late XXXX or early XXXX of XXXX, several of our mail was stolen/missing, which included the Home Depot replacement cards, a check for {$17000.00}, and other important pieces of mail. 
We immediately noticed the post office, Home Depot, and the bank that issued the check. 
In XX/XX/year> Home Depot sent out a monthly bill. I immediately noticed several charges that were unfamiliar to me and were done at the local XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX Home Depot. These purchases were done on XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, and XX/XX/year>, totaling {$1400.00}, all on the cards that were stolen. 
I have tried on several occasions to clear these charges with Home Depot but to no avail. I also pointed out that I do not use this card for purchases in any other state but Michigan, yet several months later I am unable to resolve this issue.
